calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Guardian Ad Litem'S Petition For Fees And Discharge
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph M. Barton, specially appearing for Joseph C. Barton, for and with Jeffrey Kazor, Personal Representative.

Mr. Barton reports that this Estate is ready for distribution. The court notes that Charles Jonas, guardian ad litem (GAL), is not present. There is brief discussion regarding the GAL's fees and costs. Upon consideration, the court asks Mr. Barton to advise Mr. Jonas to deliver an ex parte application for his fees and costs as a drop-off petition, to avoid further delay in closing this matter.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution; For Allowance On Account Of Compensation To Administrator And To Attorney
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Barton, via Zoom, for Jeffrey Kazor, via Zoom, Administrator; Charles Jonas, via Zoom, Guardian Ad Litem for minor.

Mr. Barton reports of receipt of balance of funds from the UK tax authority and suggests dismissal of this petition and file a Petition for Final Distribution which he can likely do within the next two to three weeks. The court advises that it will take the instant petition off calendar and set a date for status on close of the estate.

The Petition for Preliminary Distribution, etc., is taken off calendar. Status on close of the estate is set for May-24-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Status Hearing will be taken off calendar if a petition us filed by May-17-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported
